title: 目標達成の後に・“三強”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky and I have had a fairly comfortable
junior year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But soon after, she's approached by King Halo
and Special Week, both bringing declarations of
war.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Grass Wonder and El Condor Pasa have
chosen a different path, Seiun Sky's immediate
rivals are narrowed down to these two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Seiun Sky finally starts taking serious action.
Our next goal is the first race of the Classic Triple
Crown, the Satsuki Sho.
